category_sources: Official Frege README lists the Frege command-line REPL as a Frege tool.
source_facts.description says REPL (read-eval-print loop) for Frege.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title is Frege REPL.
docs_sources: Official Frege README links the command-line REPL as a related tool.
Official frege-repl repository README is the best official documentation surface for the REPL.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Frege/frege-repl, so repo is not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Frege README describes Frege as Haskell for the JVM and lists the command-line REPL.
source_facts.description identifies it as the Frege REPL.
